headline: CDL’s $2.29 annual dividend beats Treasury yields despite rising interest rates
summary: Income investors holding the VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF (NYSEARCA:CDL) own a fund built around one premise: large American companies with stable share prices tend to pay reliable dividends. CDL distributes cash monthly and paid $2.29 per share in 2025 against a current share price of roughly $76. With Treasury yields ... headline: Quitting at 59 and Bridging Eight Years to Social Security at 67? Here Is the $530,000 Income Portfolio I Would Build
summary: For a 59-year-old hoping to leave work today, the math is unforgiving. A $530,000 brokerage account would need to generate $48,000 a year for the eight-year gap before Social Security begins at 67. That requires a yield of roughly 9%, well beyond what most sustainable income portfolios can produce without gradually eroding the principal that ... Quitting at 59 and Bridging Eight Years to Social Security at 67? Here Is the $530,000 Income Portfolio I Would Build
